Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 10}You can decide who to take into combat at {f 0 1 2}locations where you can change party members{f 0 1 27}, such as the entrance of Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 10}You can change party members by talking to your teammates or by opening the menu with {f 1 3 112} and selecting {f 0 1 2}STATUS{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
